reviews.comment:
Es la única estación y no tiene personal para atender. Se producen largas colas. Vergonzoso. Debería tener más personal.

(Translated by Google)
It's the only station and it's understaffed. There are long queues. It's shameful. They should have more staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURaaV9qMHVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un sólo playero para más de 20 vehículos, Mucha desidia. El lugar estaba bastante poco ordenado. La atención del personal es cordial y amable. Las maneras de los surtidores son cortas por lo que hay que realizar la cola de vehículos, del lado que se encuentra la tapa de combustible

(Translated by Google)
Only one parking lot for more than 20 vehicles. A lot of neglect. The place was quite unorganized. The staff was friendly and helpful. The pumps are short, so you have to wait in line for vehicles on the side with the fuel cap.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURaMDYzWlVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Colas de vehículos, sin abastecimiento, sin personal. Una vergüenza para alojar turismo sin combustible

(Translated by Google)
Long lines of vehicles, no fuel, no staff. A disgrace for tourists without fuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURadmR6VDBnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un desastre y una mala onda total

(Translated by Google)
A disaster and a total bad vibe
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURaOWJlMzB3RRAB

Long wait times to refuel

They have the bathrooms closed

reviews.comment:
Mucha gente pero muy buena atención

(Translated by Google)
Lots of people but very good service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURacWMtSlJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención, largas colas, a veces un solo surtidor funcionando con un empleado. Se ve la incompetencia del encargado.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, long lines, sometimes only one pump working with one employee. The manager's incompetence is obvious.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoaXByRlJnEAE

reviews.comment:
Disfrutando de días de descanso, conociendo hermosa provincia, fue una carga rápida.

(Translated by Google)
Enjoying days off, getting to know a beautiful province, it was a quick trip.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURaOFpYSkVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Deberían tener más playeros para que el trabajo no sea tan agotador y la espera de los clientes, menor.

(Translated by Google)
They should have more beachgoers so that the work isn't so tiring and the wait for customers is shorter.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURaN3FXdmpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estuve de vacaciones en Tinogasta viajando desde Chilecito y el baño cerrado por falta de agua, una excusa para no perder  tiempo  en limpieza. La peor de todas las YPF

(Translated by Google)
I was on vacation in Tinogasta, traveling from Chilecito, and the bathroom was closed due to a lack of water—an excuse not to waste time cleaning. The worst YPF station ever.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURaNXVEd0ZnEAE

reviews.comment:
Solo dos personas para atender una cola de 50 autos, encima con surtidores que no se pueden programar  mientras el usuario espera, quien paga ese tiempo. Además con personal con licencia.

(Translated by Google)
Only two people to manage a line of 50 cars, and on top of that, the pumps can't be programmed while the customer waits, even though they're paying for that time. And the staff is unlicensed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURacW9LOUFREAE

reviews.comment:
Malisimo! Baños sucios y atención leeeeeeeenta a la hora que pases

(Translated by Google)
Terrible! Dirty bathrooms and sloooooow service no matter what time you go.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURab3ZPQnVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Al ser el lugar más confiable y económico se hace lenta la carga agregándole que tienen surtidores viejos

(Translated by Google)
While it's the most reliable and economical place, the charging process is slow, and to make matters worse, they have old pumps.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURaX0x1TWVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Personal de trabajo extremadamente lerdos para la atención...

(Translated by Google)
Extremely slow staff to provide attention...
